Todo.title: Todo
Todo.description: Represents a single to-do item managed by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Todo entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this to-do item.

title.description: The main text of the to-do item.

completed.description: Indicates whether the to-do item has been marked as complete.

isDaily.description: Whether this is a recurring daily task.

priority.description: The importance level of the task.

streakDays.description: Consecutive days this daily task was completed.

lastCompletedDate.description: Timestamp of the last completion for streak calculation.

/users/{userId}/todos/{todoId}.description: Stores individual to-do items owned by a specific user.
